title: Harness Plan Phase File
description: Structure of phase-{N}-{name}.yaml files under .harness/{slug}/03-plan/. Written by the Plan Agent; validated by 'harness scan' and 'harness next'.

phase.description: Phase number. Must match the N in the filename phase-{N}-*.yaml.

id.description: Task identifier PHASE.TASK. Must be unique across the whole plan.

inputs.description: Files this task reads. Paths relative to project root. Placeholders like {BASE}02-context.md may appear and are substituted by the orchestrator, not the CLI.

outputs.description: Files this task is expected to create/modify. Used by 'harness verify' and 'harness conflicts'. Placeholders must be resolved before execution.

prompt.description: Implementation prompt passed verbatim to the execution Agent. May be multi-line.

depends_on.description: Task ids that must complete with status=success before this task is eligible.
